productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Climacool Boat SL Blue Sports Shoes
description: We in the myntra office are going to be wearing these shoes on the beach this year and here's why... These super-light and flexible Aidas Climacool Boat SL water shoes in two tones of blue are made for extremely quick drying thanks to a strategic drainage system in the midsole and a breathable open mesh upper. And with allover Climacool ventilation, these shoes keep your feet cool in everyday outdoor situations. If you're into water Sports and are fed up with impractical footwear, or if you want to make a cool style statement which will mark you out as a fashion leader rather than a fashion follower, then these shoes are perfect for you!UpperSynthetic mesh upper printed with adidas stripesMesh is double layer for strength and open for breathability and water drainageHaul loop at heelSoft perforated lining on back heel for comfortSynthetic mesh footbedEmbossed rubber brandingOutsoleSlim, flexible rubber outsole with textured base to give good grip on wet, slippery surfacesOpen holes in the outsole to allow water to drain awayshoe careUse a cloth to remove dust and dirt
